name: Raspberry Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Greens (mixed, torn into bite-sized pieces)
1 cup Raspberries (fresh or frozen unsweetened thawed and drained)
1 tablespoon Raspberry wine vinegar OR red wine vinegar
1/2 cup Raspberries (fresh or frozen unsweetened thawed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss salad greens, chicken, raspberries, and celery in a bowl.
2. Sprinkle with almonds.
3. Serve with Raspberry Dressing and fresh ground black pepper.
4. Makes 4 servings.
Raspberry Dressing: Place all ingredients in a blender. Cover and blend on high speed for about 15 seconds or until smooth.
